title: polygala vulgaris var. adriatica
intro: Polygala vulgaris var. adriatica, also known as the common orogen or mountain milkwort, is a plant species within the milkwort family, Polygalaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polygala vulgaris var. adriatica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal applications, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
